task objective: Fix Syncthing status strip flickering, remove polling latency, deduplicate watch samples, and integrate React Ionicons
design decisions: Implemented same-status fast path rendering in autoSyncStatusSurface.tsx to prevent unnecessary blank/reloading flickers.
Replaced setInterval with immediate and recursive setTimeout in syncthingMonitor.ts to minimize first-poll latency and avoid parallel overlapping RPCs.
Added timestamp-based duplicate watch sample suppression in syncthingMonitor.ts to prevent duplicate samples from prematurely completing a watch.
Corrected watcher execution ordering in watcher.py to process events prior to serializing state samples.
Structured watcher initialization failures into descriptive RPC statuses to ensure predictable UI feedback.
Replaced custom SVGs with serialized React Ionicons (IoMdCloudDownload, IoMdCloudUpload, IoMdCloudDone) for the sync status UI.
Fixed a lifecycle bug where loadedAutoSyncStatus was not reset to null upon auto-sync status strip destruction, which could cause subsequent BrowserView recreation to render a blank page.
results: All unit and integration tests (pytest) pass successfully.
Code linter (ruff check), formatter (ruff format), and type checking (ty check) run clean.
Frontend TypeScript compilation (tsc) and Rollup bundle build (pnpm run build) complete successfully.
Codex review checks verify with no actionable regressions, and output results are archived.
